revision.text:
{{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|qid=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|qid=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|qq=|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|qq=|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Oharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|qq=|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * [[Kamiumi]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|qid=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|qid=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|qq=|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|qq=|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|qq=|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|qq=|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|qq=|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Oharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|qq=|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * [[Kamiumi]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Oharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * [[Kamiumi]]

== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Oharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * [[Kamiumi]]

The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. == Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * [[Kamiumi]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.

== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. == Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * [[Kamiumi]]

In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * [[Kamiumi]]

In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.

However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]] and [[:en:Izanami|Izanami]].
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over [[:en:Sand|sand]].
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * [[Kamiumi]]

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11455406]] Wikidata name: Katakurokushin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of {{ill|Izanagi|en|Izanagi|WD=Q813858|lt=Izanagi}} and {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami}}.
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the {{ill|Earth|en|Earth|WD=Q2|lt=Earth}}, while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over {{ill|Sand|en|Sand|WD=Q34679|lt=sand}}.
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi}} and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Japanese deities|en|List of Japanese deities|WD=Q3240847|lt=List of Japanese deities}} * [[Kamiumi]]

== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家宅六神]][[zh:家宅六神]] {{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}; {{ill|Izanami|WD=Q682306}}}}
[[Image:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|thumb|right|250px|Myth of the Birth of the Gods (Deities Born from Izanagi and Izanami) [[Media:Descendants of Izanagi and Izanami.svg|View in SVG (for supported browsers)]]]] '''Katakurokushin''' (家宅六神) refers to the collective name of the six [[deities (Shinto)|deities]] representing (or protecting) [[:en:Households|Households]] in [[Shinto]].
The Katakurokushin represent the materials and structure of buildings. According to the ''[[Kojiki]]'', all six deities were born after the [[Kuniumi]] (birth of the land), following the birth of '''{{ill|Ōkoto-oshi'o|ja|大事忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkoto-oshi'o|1=Oogotooshionokami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10933447}}''', as children of {{ill|Izanagi|en|Izanagi|WD=Q813858|lt=Izanagi}} and {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami}}.
== Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami == The first deity born is '''{{ill|Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja|石土毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatsuchi-BiKo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
== Iwasu-hime-no-Kami == The second deity is '''{{ill|Iwasu-HiMe|ja|石巣比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwasu-HiMe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''.
According to the {{ill|Koshiden|ja|古史伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshiden|1=Koshiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410975}}, these two deities are alternative names for {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|上筒男神|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Uwatatsu-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}. In {{ill|Jinmyōkō|8=ja|9=神名考|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinmyōkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is stated that Iwatsuchi-biko-no-Kami governs over the {{ill|Earth|en|Earth|WD=Q2|lt=Earth}}, while Iwasu-hime-no-Kami governs over {{ill|Sand|en|Sand|WD=Q34679|lt=sand}}.
== Ōtohiwake-no-Kami == The third deity is '''{{ill|Ōtohi-WaKe|ja|大戸日別神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtohi-WaKe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}''', whose gender is unknown. The ''[[:en:Kojikiden|Kojikiden]]'' suggests that this deity may be confused with {{ill|Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōnaobi no Kami|lt=Ōna-obi|ja|大直毘神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōna-obi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 直毘神}}. In ''Jinmyōkō'', Ōtohiwake-no-Kami is considered one of the gate deities.
== Ame-no-Fukio-no-Kami == The fourth deity is '''{{ill|Ame-no-FukiO|ja|天之吹男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-FukiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. The ''Kojikiden'' interprets this deity, based on the name, as being the same as {{ill|Ibukidōnushi|ja|気吹戸主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidōnushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''[[Ōharae no Kotoba|Ōharae no Kotoba]]''. In ''Jinmyōkō'', this deity is considered the deity of rooftops.
== Oyabiko-no-Kami == The fifth deity is '''{{ill|Oyabiko|ja|大屋毘古神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyabiko|qq=}}'''. This is considered a different deity from the {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|大屋毘古神|lt=Oyabiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} who appears in the myths of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi}} and is also an alternative name for {{ill|Itonokami|ja|五十猛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itonokami|1=Isotakeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10881556}}.
== Kazamo-tsuwake-no-Oshio-no-Kami == The last deity born is '''{{ill|Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja|風木津別之忍男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazamo-Tsuwake-no-OshiO|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家宅六神|1=Katakurokushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11455406}}'''. Regarding the reading of the name, the original text notes that the character for "木" should be read as "mo." However, the ''Kojikiden'' suggests this annotation was mistakenly inserted later, proposing the reading "Kazaketsuwake Oshio." The ''Kojikiden'' also considers this deity to be the same as {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja|底筒男神|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sokotsutsuo-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} or {{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who appears in the ''Ōharae no Kotoba''.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Japanese deities|en|List of Japanese deities|WD=Q3240847|lt=List of Japanese deities}} * [[Kamiumi]]
